name: android-mobile-config
description: Configure Android product flavors, app assets, and optional network security from agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Configure Android flavors and app assets
interface.longDescription: Deterministic Android setup workflows for product flavors, flavor-specific app names, generated assets, and optional network security.
defaultPrompt: Use Android Mobile Config to configure dev and prod Android flavors.
Use Android Mobile Config to generate Android app assets.
Use Android Mobile Config to configure dev-only network security.
